---
title: "Kernel: Normal"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Kernel: Normal}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  cache = TRUE,
  cache.path = "cache/kernel-normal-",
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

```{r normal-setup}
library(DPmixGPD)
library(nimble)
use_cached_fit <- TRUE
.fit_path <- function(name) {
  path <- system.file("extdata", name, package = "DPmixGPD")
  if (path == "") path <- file.path("inst", "extdata", name)
  path
}
fit_small <- readRDS(.fit_path("fit_small.rds"))
```

```{r normal-params-define}
w <- c(0.4, 0.6)
mean <- c(-1, 1)
sd <- c(0.7, 1.2)

x <- 0.5
p <- 0.9
```

```{r normal-densities-mix}
dNormMix(x, w = w, mean = mean, sd = sd, log = FALSE)
pNormMix(x, w = w, mean = mean, sd = sd, lower.tail = TRUE, log.p = FALSE)
qNormMix(p, w = w, mean = mean, sd = sd)
```

```{r normal-params-tail}
threshold <- 0.2
tail_scale <- 1.0
tail_shape <- 0.2
```

```{r normal-densities-gpd}
dNormMixGpd(x, w = w, mean = mean, sd = sd,
            threshold = threshold, tail_scale = tail_scale, tail_shape = tail_shape)
qNormMixGpd(0.99, w = w, mean = mean, sd = sd,
            threshold = threshold, tail_scale = tail_scale, tail_shape = tail_shape)
```

```{r normal-data-gen}
set.seed(1)
y <- abs(rnorm(30)) + 0.1
```

```{r normal-model-spec}
bundle <- build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y,
  backend = "sb",
  kernel = "normal",
  GPD = TRUE,
  J = 6
)
```

```{r normal-spec-metadata}
bundle$spec$meta
```

```{r normal-viz-histogram}
library(ggplot2)
data.frame(y = y) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = y)) +
  geom_histogram(boundary = 0, bins = 30, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(title = "Normal kernel example data", x = "y", y = "Count")
```

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
